name: Hialeah Municipal Employees
description_short: Priority Trust Credit Union (formerly HMFCU) is a member-owned credit union offering checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and auto financing with competitive rates and personalized service.
description_long:
Priority Trust Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving the community with a focus on accessible financial services. The organization has deep roots in its community, as evidenced by its 96th Annual Meeting, indicating decades of established operations and member relationships.

The credit union provides a comprehensive suite of financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal loans (signature loans and lines of credit), auto financing, motorcycle and ATV loans, RV financing, mortgages through partnerships with Member Home Loans, credit cards (Platinum Rewards Visa and Secured Visa), and insurance services. They also offer auto buying services through a preferred dealer network and member auto center partnerships. Additionally, the institution provides financial education and counseling resources to support member financial literacy.

Priority Trust distinguishes itself through competitive rate structures, personalized service, and member-focused benefits. Their auto financing rates start as low as 4.05% APR for qualified borrowers, and they offer rate discounts for automatic payments (0.25%) and substantial down payments (0.50%). The organization actively communicates fraud alerts to protect members, such as recent warnings about fake cashier's checks and impersonation scams, demonstrating proactive member security measures.

As a credit union, Priority Trust operates on a not-for-profit basis, meaning profits are returned to members through better rates and lower fees. However, membership eligibility criteria typically apply, and rates vary significantly based on creditworthiness. Second Chance loans carry higher rates (18.00% APR) and additional requirements like pledged savings. The institution's services are competitive within the credit union space, though some offerings rely on third-party partnerships for specialized services like mortgage brokerage.
services: Signature personal loans (up to 60 months, 9.00-15.99% APR)
Lines of credit (up to 60 months, 11.99-15.99% APR)
Second Chance signature loans and lines of credit (18.00% APR with pledged savings requirement)
Auto loans for new and used vehicles (up to 84 months, 4.75-17.99% APR)
ATV and 4-wheeler loans (up to 60 months, 7.00-15.99% APR)
Mortgage products through Member Home Loans partnership
Platinum Rewards Visa and Secured Visa credit cards
Auto buying services and preferred dealer network access
pros: Auto financing rates as low as 4.05% APR with automatic payment and down payment discounts available
Second Chance Loan products available for members with credit challenges (up to 18 months at 18.00% APR)
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, loans, mortgages, auto buying services, and insurance
Active fraud protection and member security alerts (fake check warnings, impersonation scam education)
Partnership with Member Home Loans for diverse mortgage products including home purchase and refinance options
Preferred dealer network and Member Auto Center for simplified auto buying experience
Financial education and counseling resources available to members
Not-for-profit structure means profits returned to members through better rates and lower fees
cons: Personal loan rates range up to 15.99% APR for standard signature loans, higher than some competitors
Second Chance products require additional pledged savings (up to $500) and mandatory automatic payments
Credit card APR rates are relatively high, ranging from 12.25% to 18.00% depending on card type
Membership eligibility requirements apply (not open to general public like banks)
Mortgage and some insurance services rely on third-party partnerships rather than direct offering
best_for: Community members seeking competitive auto financing with flexible terms up to 84 months
Individuals with fair or poor credit seeking Second Chance personal loan or line of credit products
Members prioritizing comprehensive financial services from a single institution with personalized service
Consumers interested in member-owned institutions that return profits through competitive rates
diagnosis: Priority Trust Credit Union is best for community members seeking competitive auto financing and comprehensive financial services from a member-owned institution, particularly those with established credit or who qualify for their Second Chance products. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply, rates vary significantly by creditworthiness, and personal loan and credit card APRs can be relatively high compared to some competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Hialeah Municipal Employees — NCUA-insured credit union in Hialeah, FL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
